prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为约14272→14462→21159→27183→24833名。2021–2022年基本稳定在1.4万左右，2023年大幅后移至2.1万，2024年进一步后移至2. 7万，2025年回升至约2.48万。近3年波动剧烈，2025年基准约24833名；该校在河北省物理类招生计划：2021年161人、2022年168人、2023年167人、2024年179 人、2025年192人，呈逐年小幅扩招趋势；2026年计划203人，较2025年增加11人（扩幅约5.7%），扩招将导致报考竞争略有加剧，位次数字趋于增大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 西 南交通大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年分别为2021年第51名、2022年第52名、2023年第55名、2024年第59名、2025年第52名、2026年第49名，排名稳中 有升，2026年首次进入前50，对考生吸引力有所增强；2026年声誉评价为中性/混合，无重大负面舆情；抖音综合热度排名第94位（一般水平），短视频曝光量 中等；历史投档异常记录中2023年有低关注度信号（考生因分数线波动被录取后满意度较高），未见明显断档或暴跌事件，报考心理整体平稳；交通运输工程为 A+（全国顶尖），土木工程为A，与该校交通运输类、土木工程等招生专业直接对应，对相关方向考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工 程及其自动化等专业在2024–2026年持续高热推荐，与该校计算机类、电子信息类、电气工程及其自动化等招生专业高度契合，相关专业报考热度升温将带动整体竞争。河北省202 6年高考总报名人数约60.98万，按近年物理类占比约58%估算，物理类考生约35.5万人，较2025年（36.3万）略有减少约2.1%，考生规模小幅下降对竞争有微弱缓解 作用。；该校位于四川省成都市，在河北省无本地招生倾斜；2021–2025年在河北省招生人数占全国总招生比例约2 .3%–3.0%，占比稳定且较低，地域偏好因素影响不显著。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次24833名、2026年扩招5.7%（竞争加剧）、学校软科排名首次进入前50（吸引力增 强）、相关工科专业持续高热（报考热度升温）、河北省物理类考生略减（竞争微降）等多重因素，扩招与专业热度对位次的后移作用大于考生减少与排名上升的前移作用，预计 2026年最低位次较2025年小幅后移。预测最低位次约25737名，波动区间25237–26237名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 14272 → 14462 → 21159 → 27183 → 24833. In 2021–2022, it was basically stable around 14,000, but in 2023 it significantly dropped to 21,000, and in 2024 further dropped to 27,000, before rebounding to about 24,800 in 2025. The fluctuations have been severe in the past three years, with a baseline of about 24,833 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Hebei Province: 161 in 2021, 168 in 2022, 167 in 2023, 179 in 2024, and 192 in 2025, showing a gradual small expansion trend. The 2026 plan is 203 students, an increase of 11 from 2025 (an expansion of about 5.7%), which will slightly intensify competition and tend to increase the ranking number.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Southwest Jiaotong University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. Its Soft Science Chinese University Rankings in recent years: 51st in 2021, 52nd in 2022, 55th in 2023, 59th in 2024, 52nd in 2025, and 49th in 2026, showing a stable or slightly rising trend, entering the top 50 for the first time in 2026, which enhances its appeal to candidates. The reputation evaluation for 2026 is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion. Its comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 94th (average level), with moderate short video exposure. Historical abnormal admission records show a low attention signal in 2023 (candidates were satisfied after being admitted due to score line fluctuations), with no obvious gaps or sharp drops, and overall application psychology is stable. Transportation Engineering is A+ (top in the country), and Civil Engineering is A, directly corresponding to the university's transportation and civil engineering enrollment majors, strongly attracting candidates in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation have been highly recommended in 2024–2026, closely matching the university's enrollment majors in Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Electrical Engineering and Automation. The rising popularity of these majors will drive overall competition. The total number of Hebei Province college entrance exam registrants in 2026 is about 609,800. Based on the recent Physics Category proportion of about 58%, the estimated number of Physics Category candidates is about 355,000, a slight decrease of about 2.1% from 2025 (363,000), which slightly alleviates competition. The university is located in Chengdu, Sichuan Province, with no local admission preference in Hebei. From 2021 to 2025, the proportion of Hebei admissions to total national admissions was about 2.3%–3.0%, stable and low, so regional preference factors are not significant.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 24,833, the 2026 enrollment expansion of 5.7% (intensified competition), the university's Soft Science ranking entering the top 50 for the first time (increased appeal), the sustained high popularity of related engineering majors (rising application heat), and a slight decrease in Hebei Physics Category candidates (slight competition reduction), the backward effect of expansion and major popularity on ranking is greater than the forward effect of candidate reduction and ranking rise. It is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will slightly decrease compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 25,737, with a fluctuation range of 25,237–26,237.

- Electrical Engineering and Automation
- Artificial Intelligence.

Tier 2 (Moderate)

- Automation

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Civil Engineering
- Materials (including Materials Science and Engineering, Materials Forming and Control Engineering)
- Surveying and Mapping (including Surveying Engineering, Remote Sensing Science and Technology, Geographic Information Science)
- Business Administration (including Information Management and Information Systems, Business Administration, Accounting, Engineering Management).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is about 25,737, with a range of 25,237–26,237. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit (25,237) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 popular majors (Computer Science, Electronic Information, Electrical Engineering). Those with rankings in the middle range (about 25,700) are advised to prioritize Tier 2 advantageous majors (Transportation, Automation, Data Science) while also attempting Tier 1 as a stretch. Candidates near the upper limit (26,237) are advised to use Tier 3 majors as a safety net, while also trying Tier 2 majors with lower ranking requirements. The university's A+ Transportation Engineering discipline is outstanding, and related majors offer high cost-performance, worthy of attention.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 2654 → 2697 → 3329 → 3368 → 3363. In 2021–2022, it stabilized around 2600–2700, and after 2023, it shifted to about 3300 and remained stable, fluctuating narrowly within the 3300–3370 range in recent three years, with a baseline of about 3363 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Hebei Province: 11 in 2021, 13 in 2022, 13 in 2023, 13 in 2024, 12 in 2025, overall stable; in 2026, the plan is 15, an increase of 3 (25% expansion) compared to 2025, a significant expansion that will notably intensify competition, causing rankings to increase.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text:
211 Project, Double First-Class university; Soft Science ranking entered the top 50 for the first time in 2026 (49th), with a steadily rising ranking, which also has some brand appeal to liberal arts candidates; in 2026, reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, Douyin popularity is average (94th overall), no major negative public opinion; no signs of gaps in historical admission anomalies for History Category at this university, overall application psychology is stable; the university is strong in engineering, liberal arts disciplines have not reached A- or above ratings, but the 211 platform still attracts liberal arts candidates.
6. [Major Popularity and Environment] Law major popularity in 2024 was divided and wait-and-see, recommended in 2025; Chinese Language and Literature/Chinese major was recommended and slightly hot in 2023–2024; Journalism and Communication was clearly discouraged in 2023. The university's History Category enrollment majors mainly include Law, Chinese Language and Literature, Journalism and Communication, Foreign Languages and Literature, Public Administration, Political Science and Administration. Law and Chinese Language and Literature have higher popularity, while Journalism and Communication has lower popularity. In 2026, the estimated number of History Category candidates in Hebei Province is about 254,000, an increase of about 4.3% from 2025 (244,000), and the growth in candidate numbers will intensify competition.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The university is located in Sichuan Province, with no local enrollment preference in Hebei, and regional preference has no significant impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 3363, a significant 25% enrollment expansion in 2026 (notably intensifying competition), an increase of about 4.3% in History Category candidates (intensifying competition), and higher popularity of majors like Law and Chinese Language and Literature, the dual pressure of expansion and candidate growth will significantly push rankings backward. The predicted minimum ranking is about 3967, with a fluctuation range of 3467–4467.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 3967, range 3467–4467. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit of the range (3467) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors (Law, Chinese Language and Literature); those with rankings in the middle of the range (about 3970) are advised to mainly target Tier 2 majors, with some Tier 1 sprints; those near the upper limit of the range (4467) are advised to use Tier 3 majors as safety. The university has few liberal arts enrollment majors (only 7 majors with 15 spots in 2026 plan), so it is recommended to set Law and Chinese Language and Literature as core targets, and carefully evaluate Journalism and Communication based on personal interest.
